summary: Set 055 Session 2 (final) implemented the locked structured-verification issue artifact. Shipped docs/session-issues.schema.json (the v1 envelope JSON Schema), docs/session-issues-schema-example.json (a concrete findings-bearing instance), docs/session-issues-schema.md (the orchestrator-facing reference), and ai_router/tests/test_session_issues_schema.py (14 tests validating the example against the schema and asserting the locked invariants). Updated docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md (artifact table, retired-directory note, Step 6 + Step 7 persistence instructions, cancel/appears-on-disk references) and docs/planning/session-set-authoring-guide.md. Per the S1 verdict, no helper shipped (no real duplication; the package has no existing issue-artifact write path) and the schema/example live under docs/ rather than the packaged ai_router/schemas/ (no runtime reader; the set stays release-free). Cross-provider verification by gemini-2.5-pro returned VERIFIED with zero findings and UPHELD all three engineering decisions. Full Python suite: 1074 passed, 1 skipped. No PyPI or Marketplace release: only docs, a static JSON schema/example, and a test landed — no importable ai_router runtime module changed.
